Set quote_type.description: Denotes preferred quoting style for string literals.

Set c_include_path.description: Denotes the include paths of header files for C-family languages.

Set java_class_path.description: Denotes the CLASSPATH used by Java source files.

Set curly_bracket_next_line.description: Denotes whether the left curly bracket should be on the next line.

Set spaces_around_operators.description: Denotes whether spaces should be present around arithmetic and boolean operators.

Set spaces_around_brackets.description: Denotes how spaces should be around brackets and parentheses.

Set indent_brace_style.description: Denotes the style for using curly braces in code blocks.

Set wildcard_import_limit.description: Denotes the number of imports required before collapsing/expanding wildcards.

Set block_comment_start.description: Denotes the block comment start marker.

Set block_comment_end.description: Denotes the block comment end marker.
